name: BirdieFinish Golf
about: BirdieFinish Golf is a specialized golf facility in Oregon City, OR, offering custom club fitting, repairs, lessons, and indoor play on an XGolf simulator. The venue focuses on personalized service with a Master Clubmaker and Top-100 Club Fitter, providing honest fittings and handcrafted clubs without factory-built options. Indoor golf features the most realistic XGolf simulator with 93 courses available, and lessons are conducted using advanced video analysis technology. The facility operates on an appointment-only basis with detailed seasonal hours, ensuring a private and comfortable environment for golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most realistic XGolf simulator technology
Expert custom club fitting with free trial clubs
Video swing analysis with high-speed cameras
PGA Tour Van-level craftsmanship and service

simulator_hardware.notes: Most realistic and accurate golf simulator in the world with dual high-speed cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs for fittings and practice. The facility also offers club rentals and demo clubs for testing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink is mentioned as being permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically 1 hour per player for 18 holes on the simulator, depending on group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific kid-friendly amenities or policies are mentioned. The focus appears to be on adult golfers and serious practice.
